mapper.sql: id, report_id, actor_id, action, reason, duration_seconds, create_time
id, report_id, actor_id, action, reason, duration_seconds, create_time
mapper.insert: insert into moderation_action() values(#{id, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{reportId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{actorId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{action}, #{reason}, #{durationSeconds}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select from moderation_action where report_id = #{reportId, jdbcType=BINARY} order by create_time asc, id asc
